---
title: "Results"
author: "abi :)"
date: "2026-04-03"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)     
library(ggplot2)   
library(dplyr)     
library(stringr)   
library(fs)     
library(igraph)
```
# GROWTH MEDIA COMPARASION 
```{r}
path_lb <- "/home/abigaylmontantearenas/Documents/proyecto_tesis/04_resultados/rizo/biomass/individuales/lb"
path_lb10 <- "/home/abigaylmontantearenas/Documents/proyecto_tesis/04_resultados/rizo/biomass/individuales/lb10"

biomass_files_lb <- sort(list.files(path = path_lb, pattern = "prokka_carveme_lb_lb\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE))
biomass_files_lb10 <- sort(list.files(path = path_lb10, pattern = "prokka_carveme_lb_lb10\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE))

output_folder <- "/home/abigaylmontantearenas/Documents/proyecto_tesis/04_resultados/rizo/graph"
dir_create(output_folder)

# 2. Dictionaries
colores_bac <- c(
  STECOLI = "#00FF00", 
  ST00060 = "#D4807C", 
  ST00094 = "#C76662", 
  ST00101 = "#5F9EAD", 
  ST00110 = "#B7464C", 
  ST00164 = "#9E3345", 
  ST00143 = "#752530", 
  ST00042 = "#80B6B3", 
  ST00109 = "#3D788E", 
  ST00154 = "#26526B", 
  ST00046 = "#1A3749"
)

name_bac <- c(
  STECOLI = "Escherichia coli", 
  ST00060 = "Arthrobacter sp.",
  ST00094 = "Rhodococcus erythropolis", 
  ST00101 = "Pseudomonas sp.",
  ST00110 = "Variovorax paradoxus", 
  ST00164 = "Bacillus thuringiensis",
  ST00143 = "Paenibacillus sp.", 
  ST00042 = "Pseudomonas umsongensis",
  ST00109 = "Mycobacterium sp.", 
  ST00154 = "Agrobacterium sp.",
  ST00046 = "Bacillus sp."
)

# 3. Loop 
for (i in seq_along(biomass_files_lb)) {
  
  # Extract ID
  model_id <- str_extract(basename(biomass_files_lb[i]), "^[^_]+")
  
  if (!model_id %in% names(colores_bac)) {
    warning(paste("ID not found in dictionary, skipping:", model_id))
    next
  }
  
  # LB data
  df_lb <- read_csv(biomass_files_lb[i], show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
    mutate(time_h = seq(0, by = 0.1, length.out = n()),
           biomass = .[[2]],
           Condition = "LB") %>%
    select(time_h, biomass, Condition)

  # LB/10 data
  df_lb10 <- read_csv(biomass_files_lb10[i], show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
    mutate(time_h = seq(0, by = 0.1, length.out = n()),
           biomass = .[[2]],
           Condition = "LB_10%") %>%
    select(time_h, biomass, Condition)

  # Combine
  df_plot <- bind_rows(df_lb, df_lb10)
  
  # 4. Generate Plot
  p <- ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = time_h, y = biomass, linetype = Condition)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 1.2, color = colores_bac[model_id]) +
    scale_linetype_manual(values = c("LB" = "solid", "LB_10%" = "dotted")) +
    labs(
      title = paste(name_bac[model_id]),
      subtitle = paste("Model ID:", model_id),
      x = "Time (h)",
      y = expression(paste(italic("Biomass"), " (gr)"))
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold.italic"),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "bottom"
    )
  
  # 5. Save
  output_file <- file.path(output_folder, paste0("comparison_media_", model_id, ".png"))
  
  ggsave(
    filename = output_file,
    plot = p,
    width = 8,
    height = 6,
    dpi = 300
  )
}

plot(p)
```
# INDIVIDUAL BIOMASS CURVES

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)
library(fs)

# carpeta base
base_path <- "/home/abigaylmontantearenas/Documents/proyecto_tesis/04_resultados/rizo/resultados"

# 🔥 buscar SOLO carpetas que empiezan con "op"
op_dirs <- list.dirs(base_path, recursive = FALSE)
op_dirs <- op_dirs[grepl("/op", op_dirs)]

# construir rutas a biomass.txt
biomass_files <- file.path(op_dirs, "biomass.txt")

# quedarse solo con los que existen
biomass_files <- biomass_files[file.exists(biomass_files)]

# carpeta de salida
output_folder <- "/home/abigaylmontantearenas/Documents/proyecto_tesis/04_resultados/rizo/graph"
dir_create(output_folder)

# loop
for (file_path in biomass_files) {
  
  op_id <- basename(dirname(file_path))  # ej: op94
  
  df <- read.table(file_path, header = FALSE)
  
  if (ncol(df) < 5) {
    warning(paste("Formato incorrecto:", file_path))
    next
  }
  
  colnames(df) <- c("time", "c2", "c3", "model", "biomass")
  
  df$time <- as.numeric(df$time)
  df$biomass <- as.numeric(df$biomass)
  
  model_id <- str_extract(df$model[1], "^[^_]+")
  
  if (!model_id %in% names(colores_bac)) {
    warning(paste("ID not found:", model_id))
    next
  }
  
  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = time, y = biomass)) +
    geom_line(
      linewidth = 1.3,
      color = colores_bac[model_id]
    ) +
    labs(
      title = paste("Growth curve", name_bac[model_id], "-", op_id),
      x = "Cycles",
      y = expression(paste(italic("Biomass"), " (g)"))
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 14)
  
  print(p)
  
  output_file <- file.path(
    output_folder,
    paste0("growth_", model_id, "_", op_id, ".png")
  )
  
  ggsave(output_file, p, width = 10, height = 7, dpi = 300)
}
```
# INDIVIDUAL BIOMASS CURVES (just one graph)
ocupo seleccionar los renglones correspondiente a las horas, ahorita me esta graficando todos los ciclos

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)
library(fs)

# diccionarios
colores_bac <- c(
  STECOLI = "#00FF00", 
  ST00060 = "#D4807C", 
  ST00094 = "#C76662", 
  ST00101 = "#5F9EAD", 
  ST00110 = "#B7464C", 
  ST00164 = "#9E3345", 
  ST00143 = "#752530", 
  ST00042 = "#80B6B3", 
  ST00109 = "#3D788E", 
  ST00154 = "#26526B", 
  ST00046 = "#1A3749"
)

name_bac <- c(
  STECOLI = "Escherichia coli", 
  ST00060 = "Arthrobacter sp.",
  ST00094 = "Rhodococcus erythropolis", 
  ST00101 = "Pseudomonas sp.",
  ST00110 = "Variovorax paradoxus", 
  ST00164 = "Bacillus thuringiensis",
  ST00143 = "Paenibacillus sp.", 
  ST00042 = "Pseudomonas umsongensis",
  ST00109 = "Mycobacterium sp.", 
  ST00154 = "Agrobacterium sp.",
  ST00046 = "Bacillus sp."
)

# carpeta base
base_path <- "/home/abigaylmontantearenas/Documents/proyecto_tesis/04_resultados/rizo/resultados"

# carpetas opXX
op_dirs <- list.dirs(base_path, recursive = FALSE)
op_dirs <- op_dirs[grepl("/op[0-9]+$", op_dirs)]

# archivos
biomass_files <- file.path(op_dirs, "biomass.txt")
biomass_files <- biomass_files[file.exists(biomass_files)]

# 🔥 data frame acumulado
all_data <- data.frame()

# loop
for (file_path in biomass_files) {
  
  op_id <- basename(dirname(file_path))
  
  df <- read.table(file_path, header = FALSE)
  
  if (ncol(df) < 5) next
  
  colnames(df) <- c("time", "c2", "c3", "model", "biomass")
  
  df$time <- as.numeric(df$time)
  df$biomass <- as.numeric(df$biomass)
  
  model_id <- str_extract(df$model[1], "^[^_]+")
  
  if (is.na(model_id) || !model_id %in% names(colores_bac)) next
  
  # agregar info
  df$model_id <- model_id
  df$species <- name_bac[model_id]
  df$op <- op_id
  
  # acumular
  all_data <- bind_rows(all_data, df)
}

# 🎨 gráfica conjunta
p <- ggplot(all_data, aes(x = time, y = biomass, group = interaction(model_id, op))) +
  geom_line(aes(color = model_id), linewidth = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colores_bac, labels = name_bac) +
  scale_y_log10() + 
  labs(
    title = "Growth curves (all simulations)",
    x = "Cycles",
    y = expression(paste(italic("Biomass"), " (g)")),
    color = "Species"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold.italic"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

print(p)

# guardar
output_folder <- "/home/abigaylmontantearenas/Documents/proyecto_tesis/04_resultados/rizo/graph"
dir_create(output_folder)

ggsave(
  file.path(output_folder, "all_growth_curves.png"),
  p,
  width = 12,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)





```
# FINAL PRODUCTIVYTI 
```{r}






```


# Compare mets 

```{r}

mets_files <- sort(
  list.files(
    path = "/home/abigaylmontantearenas/Documents/proyecto_tesis/04_resultados/rizo/mets/individuales",
    pattern = "_mets\\.csv$", 
    full.names = TRUE
  )
)

output_folder <- "/home/abigaylmontantearenas/Documents/proyecto_tesis/04_resultados/rizo/graph"
if (!dir.exists(output_folder)) dir.create(output_folder, recursive = TRUE)

# Loop 
for (input_file in mets_files) {
  
  # Extract ID
  model_id <- str_extract(basename(input_file), "^[^_]+")
  
  if (!model_id %in% names(colores_bac)) {
    warning(paste("ID not found in dictionary, skipping:", model_id))
    next
  }
  
  df <- read_csv(input_file, show_col_types = FALSE)
  
  plot_df <- tibble(
    time_h  = seq(0, by = 0.1, length.out = nrow(df)), 
    concentration = df[[2]]  
  )
  
  # plot
  p <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = time_h, y = concentration)) +
    geom_line(
      linewidth = 1.3,
      color = colores_bac[model_id]
    ) +
    labs(
      title = paste("Metabolite Profile –", name_bac[model_id]),
      subtitle = paste("Model:", model_id),
      x = "Time (h)",
      y = "Concentration (mmol/L)" # Adjust units as necessary for your GEMs
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold.italic"),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
    )
  
  # Save
  output_file <- file.path(output_folder, paste0("individual_mets_", model_id, ".png"))
  
  ggsave(
    filename = output_file,
    plot = p,
    width = 10,
    height = 7,
    dpi = 300
  )
}
```

# BIOMASSA FINAL (PRODUCTIVIDAD) INVIDIVDUAL VS COMUNIDAD 
```{r}

library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)


path_ind <- "/home/abigaylmontantearenas/Documents/proyecto_tesis/04_resultados/rizo/simulaciones/individuales/lb10/"
path_com <- "/home/abigaylmontantearenas/Documents/proyecto_tesis/04_resultados/rizo/simulaciones/comunidades/biomasa/"

archivos_individuales <- list.files(path_ind, pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)
archivos_comunidades  <- list.files(path_com, pattern = "comunidad_.*\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)


library(ggplot2)
library(ggplot2)

for (f_ind in archivos_individuales) {
  
  # Extraer ID
  id_cepa <- sub("_prokka_carveme_lb_lb10.csv", "", basename(f_ind))
  
  # Leer archivo individual
  df_indi <- read.csv(f_ind)
  
  val_ind <- ifelse(nrow(df_indi) >= 82, df_indi[82, 2], NA)
  
  # Crear base con columna única Biomasa
  resultados_cepa <- data.frame(
    ID = id_cepa,
    Origen = "Individual",
    Biomasa = as.numeric(val_ind)
  )
  
  # =========================
  # Buscar en comunidades
  # =========================
for (f_com in archivos_comunidades) {
  
  df_com <- read.csv(f_com)
  id_com <- sub("_biomasa.csv", "", basename(f_com))
  
  # Buscar columna que coincida con la cepa
  col_match <- grep(id_cepa, colnames(df_com), value = TRUE)
  
  if (length(col_match) > 0) {
    
    val_com <- tryCatch(
      as.numeric(df_com[nrow(df_com), col_match[1]]),
      error = function(e) NA
    )
    
    resultados_cepa <- rbind(resultados_cepa, data.frame(
      ID = id_cepa,
      Origen = paste("Comunidad", id_com),
      Biomasa = val_com
    ))
  }
}
  
  # =========================
  # GRAFICA DE BARRAS
  # =========================
  
  if (nrow(resultados_cepa) > 1) {
    
    p <- ggplot(resultados_cepa, aes(x = Origen, y = Biomasa, fill = Origen)) +
      geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = "black", width = 0.6) +
      scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set3") +
      theme_minimal() +
      labs(
        title = paste("Cepa:", id_cepa),
        subtitle = "Biomasa final",
        x = "Condición",
        y = "Biomasa"
      ) +
      theme(
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        legend.position = "none"
      )
    
    print(p)
    
  } else {
    message(paste("No se encontraron datos de comunidad para:", id_cepa))
  }
}

```
# RANKING BIOMASA
```{r}

library(dplyr)

path_ind <- "/home/abigaylmontantearenas/Documents/proyecto_tesis/04_resultados/rizo/simulaciones/individuales/lb10/"

archivos_individuales <- list.files(path_ind, pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)

resultados <- data.frame()

for (f_ind in archivos_individuales) {
  
  id_cepa <- sub("_prokka_carveme_lb_lb10.csv", "", basename(f_ind))
  
  df_indi <- read.csv(f_ind)
  
  # Tomar la ÚLTIMA fila (más robusto)
  val_ind <- if (nrow(df_indi) > 0) {
    df_indi[nrow(df_indi), 2]
  } else {
    NA
  }
  
  resultados <- rbind(resultados, data.frame(
    ID = id_cepa,
    Score = val_ind
  ))
}

# Ranking final
resultados <- resultados %>%
  arrange(desc(Score)) %>% 
  mutate(rank = row_number())

print(resultados)



##################


```

```{r}
# 1. Configuración de rutas
path_com <- "/home/abigaylmontantearenas/Documents/proyecto_tesis/04_resultados/rizo/simulaciones/comunidades/biomasa/"
archivos_comunidades <- list.files(path_com, pattern = "comunidad_.*\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)
# Usando la lógica de tu loop original pero corregida
resultados_comunidades <- list()

for (f_com in archivos_comunidades) {
  df_com <- read.csv(f_com)
  id_com <- sub("_biomasa.csv", "", basename(f_com))
  
  # Extraer la última fila
  ultima_biomasa <- df_com[nrow(df_com), ]
  
  # Crear un data frame de la última fila (transpuesto)
  df_ranking <- data.frame(
    ID = names(ultima_biomasa),
    Score = as.numeric(ultima_biomasa)
  )
  
  # Filtrar solo las que están en tu lista de 'resultados'
  df_ranking <- df_ranking[df_ranking$ID %in% resultados$ID, ]
  
  # Ordenar y añadir el número de rank
  df_ranking <- df_ranking[order(-df_ranking$Score), ]
  df_ranking$rank <- 1:nrow(df_ranking)
  
  # Guardar en la lista
  resultados_comunidades[[id_com]] <- df_ranking
}

print(resultados_comunidades[[1]])
print(resultados_comunidades[[2]])
print(resultados_comunidades[[3]])
print(resultados_comunidades[[4]])
print(resultados_comunidades[[5]])

```

```{r}
colores_bac <- c(
  ST00060 = "#D4807C", 
  ST00094 = "#C76662", 
  ST00101 = "#5F9EAD", 
  ST00110 = "#B7464C", 
  ST00164 = "#9E3345", 
  ST00143 = "#752530", 
  ST00042 = "#80B6B3", 
  ST00109 = "#3D788E", 
  ST00154 = "#26526B", 
  ST00046 = "#1A3749"
)

name_bac <- c(
  ST00060 = "Arthrobacter sp.",
  ST00094 = "Rhodococcus erythropolis", 
  ST00101 = "Pseudomonas sp.",
  ST00110 = "Variovorax paradoxus", 
  ST00164 = "Bacillus thuringiensis",
  ST00143 = "Paenibacillus sp.", 
  ST00042 = "Pseudomonas umsongensis",
  ST00109 = "Mycobacterium sp.", 
  ST00154 = "Agrobacterium sp.",
  ST00046 = "Bacillus sp."
)

mcompetition_path <- '/home/abigaylmontantearenas/Documents/proyecto_tesis/phylomint/mcompetition.csv'

mcompetition <- read.csv(mcompetition_path, header=TRUE, row.names=1, check.names=FALSE)
mcompetition <- data.matrix(mcompetition)

# Convert matrix to dataframe
data_df <- as.data.frame(as.table(mcompetition))

# Asiganr nombres
data_df$Var1 <- name_bac[as.character(data_df$Var1)]
data_df$Var2 <- name_bac[as.character(data_df$Var2)]
# Plot heatmap
heatmap_plot <- ggplot(data_df, aes(x = Var1, y = Var2, fill = Freq)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") + # Create heatmap
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "white", high = "steelblue") + # Set color gradient
  theme_minimal() + # Set theme
  labs(x = 'strains' , y = 'strains' , title = "Heatmap with Values") + # Labels
  labs(fill = "competition index") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) # Rotate x-axis labels

# Add values to the heatmap
plot(heatmap_plot)

##################
g_competition <- graph_from_adjacency_matrix(
  mcompetition,
  mode = "directed",
  weighted = TRUE
  
)

E(g_competition)$weight
mcompetition[mcompetition < 0.7] <- 0
V(g_competition)$color <- colores_bac[V(g_competition)$name]
V(g_competition)$label <- name_bac[V(g_competition)$name]


plot(g_competition, edge.width = E(g_competition)$weight * 3)
###########################
mcomplementary_path <- '/home/abigaylmontantearenas/Documents/proyecto_tesis/phylomint/mcomplemetary.csv'
mcomplementary <- read.csv(mcomplementary_path, header=TRUE, row.names=1, check.names=FALSE)
mcomplementary <- data.matrix(mcomplementary)


# Convert matrix to dataframe
data_mcomplem <- as.data.frame(as.table(mcomplementary))

# Asiganr nombres
data_mcomplem$Var1 <- name_bac[as.character(data_mcomplem$Var1)]
data_mcomplem$Var2 <- name_bac[as.character(data_mcomplem$Var2)]
# Plot heatmap
heatmap_complem <- ggplot(data_mcomplem, aes(x = Var1, y = Var2, fill = Freq)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") + # Create heatmap
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "white", high = "hotpink") + # Set color gradient
  theme_minimal() + # Set theme
  labs(x = 'strains' , y = 'strains' , title = "Heatmap with Values") + # Labels
  labs(fill = "complementary index") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) # Rotate x-axis labels

plot(heatmap_complem)


####################
mcomplementary <- data.matrix(mcomplementary)
mcomplementary
#mcomplementary[mcomplementary < 0.000001] <- 0
#mcomplementary
g_complementary <- graph_from_adjacency_matrix(
  mcomplementary,
  mode = "directed",
  weighted = TRUE
  
)
E(g_complementary)$weight
V(g_complementary)$color <- colores_bac[V(g_complementary)$name]
V(g_complementary)$label <- name_bac[V(g_complementary)$name]


plot(g_complementary, edge.width = E(g_complementary)$weight * 3)
######################
setdiff(unique(rownames(mcomplementary)), names(name_bac))

```
